hero.title: Specialty medications and fertility treatments, delivered with clinical precision.
hero.subtitle: DietCo helps clinics place verified orders in minutes, with consistent availability, cold-chain handling, and transparent fulfillment across Saudi Arabia.

audience.title: Trusted access for individuals and care teams
audience.subtitle: DietCo serves individuals who need reliable access to specialty medications, fertility treatments, hormone therapies, and injectable solutions. We also support clinics and pharmacies with consistent supply, verified sourcing, and delivery coordination, so every order meets the same clinical standards.

individuals.title: Individuals
individuals.body: Order specialty treatments with clear pricing and delivery coordination.

clinics.title: Clinics
clinics.body: Consistent supply for fertility and hormone therapies with reliable lead times.

pharmacies.title: Pharmacies
pharmacies.body: Bulk ordering support with traceability and invoice-ready workflows.

process.title: How ordering works
process.subtitle: A clear, compliant workflow designed for procurement and clinical staff.

request.title: Request
request.body: Build a cart with available therapies and submit your order request.

verify.title: Verify
verify.body: We confirm inventory, licensing, and cold-chain requirements.

deliver.title: Deliver
deliver.body: Scheduled delivery with tracking and documentation included.

catalog.title: Catalog preview
catalog.subtitle: A snapshot of our most requested therapies. View the full catalog to browse by category and availability.

featured.title: Featured categories
featured.subtitle: Start with the most requested therapies for fertility and specialty care.

onboarding.title: Not sure where to start?
onboarding.subtitle: Take our 2-minute personalized assessment and get product recommendations tailored to your needs.

footer.copyright: © 2026 DietCo. Licensed healthcare marketplace serving Saudi Arabia.

securePanel.complianceTitle: Do not collect raw card details yourself

1.name: Ovemer Plus
1.description: Supports fertility and reproductive health. Promotes ovarian health, improves egg quality, and helps regulate menstrual cycles.

2.name: Lino Max
2.description: Supports ovarian health and hormonal balance. Reduces chronic fatigue and menstrual disorders while enhancing natural energy levels.

3.name: Fertalight
3.description: Stimulates ovulation and treats PCOS. Restores hormonal balance, increases ovarian activity, and acts as an antioxidant to improve egg quality.

4.name: Reveal Myo-Inositol
4.description: Regulates menstrual cycles, reduces PCOS symptoms including weight gain and acne, and improves chances of conception.

5.name: Inovari Plus
5.description: Contains inositol and folic acid. Supports ovarian health, improves hormonal balance, and regulates menstrual cycles for PCOS.

6.name: Inovari
6.description: Formulated with Myo-Inositol 1000mg and D-Chiro Inositol 25mg. Manages PCOS, improves egg quality, and promotes regular cycles.

7.name: Cystol
7.description: Treats menstrual disorders, helps reduce weight, manages polycystic ovaries, achieves hormonal balance, and increases conception chances.

8.name: Myomed Tabs
8.description: Delivers 1,250mg Myo-Inositol per tablet. Supports hormonal balance, menstrual regulation, ovarian function, and PCOS management.

9.name: Brooks Fem
9.description: Treats polycystic ovaries by supporting egg quality. Increases insulin sensitivity, reduces hyperandrogenism, and improves menstrual regularity.

10.name: Motova C
10.description: Contains Levocarnitine tartrate, Acetylcarnitine, and Zinc 15mg. Treats PCOS, improves egg quality, and regulates menstrual cycles.

11.name: Qupene
11.description: Contains Coenzyme Q10 200mg and Lycopene 2000mcg. Increases male fertility, improves sperm count and motility, and supports egg production.

12.name: Qufix
12.description: CoQ10 with lycopene for cell division. Supports poor sperm motility, low sperm count, and egg production in women.

13.name: Q-Cell 200
13.description: CoQ10 increases male fertility by improving sperm count and motility, and helps women with egg production.

14.name: Limitless
14.description: Contains L-arginine, L-carnitine, zinc, selenium, and vitamins C and E. Supports fertility, sexual health, and cell division.

15.name: Argerekt Plus
15.description: Advanced dietary supplement for sexual health. Enhances performance, supports prostate health, and improves blood circulation.

16.name: Prime Ultra
16.description: L-Carnitine and antioxidants including glutathione. Supports spermatogenesis and improves sperm motility and count.

17.name: Brox Fort
17.description: Contains CoQ10, L-carnitine, acetyl L-carnitine, antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals. Specifically formulated to treat weak sperm motility.

18.name: Forta 6
18.description: Powdered dietary supplement. Increases sperm count, improves sperm morphology and motility, and helps treat erectile dysfunction.

19.name: Forta 30
19.description: Dietary supplement supporting male fertility. Increases sperm count and improves morphology and motility.

20.name: Supra
20.description: Contains arginine, Ginkgo biloba, taurine, and maritime pine. Boosts erectile function, improves circulation, and supports overall health.

21.name: Fertamol
21.description: Contains L-Carnitine 2300mg, CoQ10 150mg, Glutathione, multivitamins, and minerals. Enhances sperm production and egg quality for both genders.

22.name: Mega-Q Omega 3
22.description: Fish oil supplement with Omega-3. Supports fertility in both genders, helps manage triglycerides, and prevents atherosclerosis.

23.name: Motofa Plus 60
23.description: L-Carnitine converts fat to energy. Increases fertility in males and females by improving sperm motility and ovulation rates.

24.name: Motova Plus 30
24.description: L-Carnitine converts fat to energy. Increases fertility by improving sperm motility, ovulation rates, and egg size.

25.name: Bedova Powder
25.description: Increases fertility for both men and women. Contains L-arginine 2000mg, L-carnitine 2000mg, zinc, and antioxidants.

26.name: Folate One
26.description: Chewable tablets with methyl folate and B12. Prevents congenital defects, supports fetal nervous system development, and prevents anemia.

27.name: Preseez Ovulation Test
27.description: Home ovulation test to boost conception timing. Includes 2 pregnancy tests and 7 ovulation tests.

28.name: Fem In
28.description: Contains genistein, Agnus Castus extract, hawthorn, vitamin D3, and calcium. Relieves menopausal symptoms and supports bone health.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account details, delivery preferences, and payment summary.

payment.note: For security, only non-sensitive card details are stored. Never store full card number or CVV.

messages.saveError: Unable to update profile. Please try again.
messages.cardLast4Invalid: Card last 4 must contain exactly 4 digits
messages.cardMonthInvalid: Expiry month must be between 1 and 12
messages.cardYearInvalid: Expiry year must be 2 or 4 digits

preview.title: The recommendation updates as you go
preview.subtitle: Age, weight, and your main goal shape the final monthly options you’ll see at the end.
preview.panelBody: Choose your goal, adjust age and weight, then review personalized monthly options instead of jumping straight to cart.

gender.title: Start with the profile that fits you
gender.subtitle: We’ll tailor the guidance, product mix, and pricing view to your situation.
gender.female_hint: Focus on cycle health, egg quality, trying to conceive, or menopause support.
gender.male_hint: Focus on sperm quality, fertility support, and sexual health performance.

concern.title: What do you want this plan to solve first?
concern.subtitle: Pick the main outcome you want to improve and we’ll build around that need.
concern.pcos_desc: Hormonal imbalance, irregular periods, or polycystic ovaries
concern.egg_quality_desc: Supporting ovarian health and improving egg quality
concern.conceive_desc: Actively trying for pregnancy and tracking ovulation
concern.menopause_desc: Managing symptoms of perimenopause or menopause
concern.sperm_desc: Improving sperm count, motility, and morphology
concern.fertility_desc: General fertility enhancement and reproductive health
concern.sexual_health_desc: Supporting sexual function, energy, and performance

age.title: Dial in your age
age.subtitle: Use the arc to fine-tune how foundational or advanced your monthly support should feel.
age.helper: This helps us balance foundational support with deeper antioxidant and hormone-focused options.

weight.title: Add your current weight
weight.subtitle: This lets us weight the recommendation toward lighter support or a more targeted monthly stack.
weight.helper: For goals like PCOS, fertility, or performance, weight can change which products feel most relevant.

duration.title: How long have you been working on this?
duration.subtitle: We use this to decide whether to start lighter or show a more comprehensive monthly option.

results.title: Three ways to move forward
results.subtitle: We matched your answers to a lighter entry plan, a balanced core plan, and a more comprehensive monthly option.
results.monthlyFootnote: Approximate monthly total based on one unit of each included product.
results.disclaimer: These recommendations are informational only and should not replace clinical advice. Please review with your healthcare provider before starting any supplement.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: A lighter monthly option built around the highest-signal essentials.

focused.name: Focused
focused.description: A balanced monthly stack for your main goal with stronger day-to-day coverage.

complete.name: Complete
complete.description: A fuller monthly plan for people who want the deepest support path shown here.

reasons.ageFoundational: Your age keeps the recommendation anchored around a more foundational mix.
reasons.ageMature: Your age shifts the plan toward deeper antioxidant and reproductive support.
reasons.weightBalanced: Your current weight keeps the mix broad rather than aggressively targeted.
reasons.weightElevated: Your current weight pushes the plan toward more targeted metabolic and hormone-support options.
reasons.durationEarly: Because you are earlier in the journey, we kept at least one lighter monthly path available.
reasons.durationLonger: Because this has been ongoing for longer, we surface more comprehensive monthly options.
